name: Quirks & Talents
description: Unique abilities or strange habits that define you.

results.text: Tell exact time by shadows without a clock.
Knack for spotting hidden treasures.
Animals are naturally drawn to you.
Mimic animal calls with eerie precision.
Hold breath for an inhuman amount of time.
Know tree age by touching bark.
Expert whistler, melodies soar on the wind.
Thrown objects find their mark with supernatural precision.
Never forget a face or place once seen.
Master at skipping stones.
Feel an approaching storm before anyone else.
Contortionist: slip through narrow spaces easily.
Calming presence for panicked animals.
Gift of persuasion: calm tone turns souls.
Language of knots: expert with ropes.
Green thumb: can make anything grow.
Expert distance estimator.
Catalogue of legends: expert storyteller.
Self-taught runic scholar.
Juggler: smooth as air.
